title: neottianthe maculata
intro: Neottianthe maculata, also known as the spotted orchid or leopard orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is a terrestrial orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Neottianthe maculata typically involve drying and processing the roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
